_comment:
Rangefinder / lidar calibration. Both stack converters return `.notImplemented` in v1: AP `RNGFND_*` and PX4 `SENS_FLOW_*` / per-driver families don't overlap cleanly enough to ship a portable cal recipe.

This recipe registers for discoverability — Vehicle Inspector / wizard surfaces it in the per-system menu, and any attempt to run it returns a precise 'not supported in this app version' message. When per-stack support lands, only the converter changes; this recipe stays.

then.detail: Rangefinder calibration is not implemented in this app version. AP and PX4 use disjoint per-driver parameter families that require a stack- and driver-specific authoring pass.
Rangefinder calibration failed with an unhandled outcome — see the audit trace for the underlying response.
